tone_hints: Preferred closing observed in sent mail: "Let's Win,," then Kory.
example_snippets:
Pilot loopback — should arrive at sandbox mailbox only.

Let's Win,
Kory

Hi Cheryl Blair,
I hope you are having a productive week.
I've been thinking about your marketing approach lately.
Using social media more actively could really help you connect with your audience.
Engaging content can attract new customers and keep current ones interested.
Consider creating a content calendar to plan your posts.
This could streamline your efforts and improve your online presence.
Best regards,
Kory IconfoundWMG

Hi Wyatt Lee,
I wanted to share some thoughts on your recent business strategy.
It seems like you are doing great work, but there might be room for improvement.
Consider focusing on customer feedback to refine your services.
Listening to your clients can lead to better products and happier customers.
Also, think about collaborating with other businesses to expand your reach.
These steps could help you achieve your goals more effectively.

Hi Bohdan,
I hope you are doing well.
Networking is a powerful tool in business.
Building strong relationships can open doors to new opportunities.
Consider attending industry events or joining local business groups.
These connections can lead to valuable partnerships and collaborations.
Investing time in networking can pay off in the long run.

Best regards Kory IconfoundWMG
